what: Create the vault directory inside the Nori data folder
why: Local vaults need a physical location on disk to store knowledge files; the directory is ~/.nori/vaults/{name}/

success_handling.criteria: Directory exists and is writable at the expected path

decisions.reason: Uses mkdirSync with recursive:true so parent dirs are created automatically
decisions.rationale: Handles first-time setup where ~/.nori/vaults/ doesn't exist yet
